rubrics.description: The answer states the flight status.

content.text: The actual answer must state the flight's current status using the tool result and the reference answer. Fail if the status is missing, contradicted, or replaced by unsupported uncertainty.

rubrics.description: The answer handles delay minutes when relevant.

content.text: When the reference answer includes delay information, the actual answer must preserve the delay conclusion and minutes. Fail if delay minutes are omitted, numerically wrong, or contradicted.

rubrics.description: The answer includes the gate when the reference includes one.

content.text: When the reference answer includes a gate, the actual answer must include the same gate. Fail if the gate is missing, wrong, or replaced by unsupported fallback advice.

rubrics.description: The answer includes the relevant departure time when the reference includes one.

content.text: When the reference answer includes a scheduled or estimated departure time, the actual answer must include the same relevant time. Fail if the time is missing, wrong, or contradicted.
